Where Friends, Neighbors & Good Food Meet

Our menu
Our menu

Welcome to Kensington Cafe

Your neighborhood spot for breakfast, brunch, and lunch in the heart of historic Kensington. We serve up classic American eats with a friendly smile, a welcoming atmosphere, and plenty of space for both you and your four-legged friends on our dog-friendly patio.

Coffee. Food. Friends.

Whether you’re here for your favorite comfort food, a weekend brunch with friends, or just a casual coffee and bite to eat, we want you to feel right at home. Loved by our regulars and always excited to see new faces, Kensington Cafe is the kind of place where the community comes together.

The Best Ingredients

At Kensington Cafe, quality and freshness come first. We take pride in offering thoughtfully prepared, dishes made with the freshest ingredients. Every sauce, spread, and dressing is crafted in-house, and every plate is made to order, ensuring your meal is as fresh and flavorful as it gets.
